Description: Verify that a new booking is created successfully using valid input data
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible at https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/apidoc/index.html 2. Valid booking data is available
Test Steps: 1. Send POST request to /booking endpoint 2. Include valid booking data (firstname, lastname, totalprice, depositpaid, checkin, checkout) 3. Include valid check-in and check-out dates
Expected Result: Response status code should be 200 and response body contains a bookingid

Summary: Create booking with missing required fields
Description: Verify that API rejects booking creation with missing required fields
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Booking data template is available
Test Steps: 1. Send POST request to /booking endpoint 2. Include booking data with missing 'firstname' field 3. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 400 and error message indicates missing required field

Summary: Create booking with invalid data type
Description: Verify that API validates and rejects invalid data types
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Booking data template is available
Test Steps: 1. Send POST request to /booking endpoint 2. Include booking data with totalprice as a string instead of number 3. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 400 with appropriate validation error

Summary: Retrieve booking by valid booking ID
Description: Verify that GET request retrieves booking details correctly
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. A valid booking with known ID exists in the system
Test Steps: 1. Send GET request to /booking/{bookingid} endpoint 2. Use valid booking ID from previous test 3. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 200 and response body contains matching booking details

Summary: Retrieve booking with invalid booking ID
Description: Verify that API returns appropriate error for non-existent booking ID
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Invalid booking ID (999999) is known
Test Steps: 1. Send GET request to /booking/999999 endpoint 2. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 404 indicating booking not found

Summary: Update booking with valid data and authentication token
Description: Verify that booking is updated successfully with valid authentication
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Valid booking ID exists 3. Authentication token is generated and available
Test Steps: 1. Generate authentication token via POST to /auth endpoint 2. Send PUT request to /booking/{bookingid} endpoint 3. Include valid authentication token in header 4. Include updated booking data
Expected Result: Response status code should be 200 and booking data is updated in system

Description: Verify that API rejects update without proper authentication
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Valid booking ID exists
Test Steps: 1. Send PUT request to /booking/{bookingid} endpoint 2. Omit authentication token from headers 3. Include updated booking data
Expected Result: Response status code should be 403 indicating unauthorized access

Summary: Delete booking with valid authentication token
Description: Verify that booking is deleted successfully with proper authentication
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Valid booking ID exists 3. Authentication token is generated
Test Steps: 1. Generate authentication token via POST to /auth endpoint 2. Send DELETE request to /booking/{bookingid} endpoint 3. Include authentication token in header
Expected Result: Response status code should be 201 and booking is removed from system

Summary: Generate authentication token with valid credentials
Description: Verify that authentication token is generated successfully
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Valid username and password credentials are available
Test Steps: 1. Send POST request to /auth endpoint 2. Include username and password in request body 3. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 200 and response contains valid authentication token

Summary: Generate authentication token with invalid credentials
Description: Verify that API rejects invalid credentials
Preconditions: 1. API is accessible 2. Invalid username/password combination is known
Test Steps: 1. Send POST request to /auth endpoint 2. Include invalid username and password 3. Submit the request
Expected Result: Response status code should be 401 and error message indicates unauthorized
